summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Quasar Apps tech company website. Backend APIs working perfectly (8/8 endpoints), frontend UI loads beautifully with modern glassy design. Most features working correctly including navigation, case studies, team section. Contact form has frontend submission issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Submit button click intercepted by overlay, form submission not working from UI

integration_issues.issue: Frontend form not submitting to backend API, no success message shown, form fields not cleared

design_issues.issue: Navigation buttons (prev/next) not found for testimonials carousel

passed_tests: All 8 backend API endpoints working (100% success)
Homepage loads with Quasar Apps branding and Hero section
Navigation scrolling to all sections (Services, Work, About, Team, Contact)
Services section displays 6 service cards correctly
Case Studies section loads 3 case studies from API
Case study detail pages show complete information (challenge, solution, results, technologies)
Team section displays 4 team members with photos and roles
Contact form fields can be filled and validated
Modern glassy UI design with rounded corners and futuristic styling
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix contact form submission issue - button click is being intercepted by overlay preventing form submission. Backend API works correctly but frontend form submission fails. Also add testimonial carousel navigation buttons if intended.
